name: @realness.online/web
description: When people search for 'outsider social network' they'll find realness online. The medium is the message
author: Scott Fryxell <sfryxell@gmail.com>

scripts.build: vp run build:icons && vp run build:wasm && vp build && vp build -c vite.prerender.config.js && node scripts/prerender.js && node scripts/build-manifest.js
scripts.build:workers: WORKER_NAME=vector vp build -c workers.config.js && WORKER_NAME=compressor vp build -c workers.config.js && WORKER_NAME=tracer vp build -c workers.config.js
scripts.score: vp run build && CHROME_PATH="/Applications/Brave Browser.app/Contents/MacOS/Brave Browser" lhci autorun --collect.staticDistDir=dist --collect.url=/ --collect.numberOfRuns=1 --collect.settings.maxWaitForLoad=90000 --upload.target=temporary-public-storage && node scripts/print-lighthouse-metrics.js
scripts.score:prod: CHROME_PATH="/Applications/Brave Browser.app/Contents/MacOS/Brave Browser" lhci autorun --collect.url=https://realness.online/ --collect.numberOfRuns=1 --collect.settings.maxWaitForLoad=90000 --upload.target=temporary-public-storage && node scripts/print-lighthouse-metrics.js
scripts.deploy: vp run build:wasm && vp run build:workers && vp run build && firebase deploy --only hosting,storage -m $npm_package_version
scripts.release: vp run release:gh && vp run release:npm && git tag v$npm_package_version
scripts.test:risk: npm run test:coverage && npm run fallow:report && npm run test:risk:report
scripts.pre-commit: vp check --fix && vp run type && vp test run
scripts.server:start: node --import 'data:text/javascript,import { register } from "node:module"; import { pathToFileURL } from "node:url"; register("./loader.mjs", pathToFileURL("./"));' scripts/server.js
